name: @aims/voice-library
description: Voice reference → clone → (optional) alter → store pipeline. Ingestion is unfiltered per the attestation-not-policing policy (feedback_attestation_not_ingestion_policing.md). Compliance lives at the production layer via user attestation. Storage through SmelterOS (Puter metadata + GCS bytes). Cloning via Async (volume) or Vertex AI Chirp 3 HD Custom Voice (premium). Integrates with @aims/spinner tool registry.
